meta.label: about_us
meta.title: Smart Luggage for Urban Nomads | Horizn Studios

chunks.heading: Introduction
chunks.text: "We seek to build bridges and make connections. Our mission is to enable curious minds to make the most out of their adventures."

chunks.heading: Our Story
chunks.text: We’re here to enable curious minds to travel the world consciously and seamlessly. Always challenging the status quo and pushing ourselves to go further, we build sustainable solutions for the future of travel. In 2015, we launched a new forward-thinking travel brand for the next generation in Europe; 100% design- and innovation driven, we soon became a driving force in the industry. Thriving on curiosity, creativity, and collaboration, we design high-end luggage, backpacks, and travel

chunks.heading: Our Story
chunks.text: accessories both for your daily commute and your long-haul trips.

chunks.heading: Our Efforts and Impact
chunks.text: We believe in a world without boundaries. We want you to travel as consciously as possible, knowing that your travel companions won’t just stand the test of time, but are made responsibly. Becoming a driving force for sustainable travel is a journey we have embarked on with great respect, and we’re excited to take you along for the ride. More about our efforts and impact

chunks.heading: Our Partnerships
chunks.text: We’re firm believers in the power of creative exchange. So we’ve collaborated with like-minded brands like Beats by Dre, BMW, Soho House, and Design Hotels. To truly involve the voices shaping contemporary culture, we joined forces with acclaimed DJ and producer, Seth Troxler to design the Pro Model ST DJ case; with renowned sound artist Emeka Ogboh we created a limited range inspired by the vibrant West African metropolis of Lagos.

chunks.heading: Get in touch
chunks.text: Our dedicated customer service team is here for you. Honestly, there is no request too big or too small. We look forward to connecting with you. Get in touch via our Customer Contact Form . Lifetime Warranty on all Pro and Essential Luggage GQ : Best Suitcase of Year 2026

chunks.heading: Our Journey
chunks.text: Following our brand ethos Let’s Go. Further., we’ve been pushing the boundaries of our industry from day one. In our first year, we launched the world's first luggage featuring a removable charger. Subsequent collaborations with icons such as BMW, Beats By Dre, Soho House, and NASA astronaut Alyssa Carson have elevated our profile, culminating in the global debut of space luggage. Thanks to our brilliant international team, we have also developed the world's most sustainable high-end luggage

chunks.heading: Our Journey
chunks.text: range – and look forward to continuing to go further.

chunks.heading: Our Commitment to Sustainability
chunks.text: While the RE Series and its 97% recycled hard shell benchmarked sustainable polycarbonate luggage, our R&D team collaborates with material science experts on Circle One and its 100% plant-based hard shell, making it the world's most sustainable luxury luggage. Proving that performance and sustainability aren’t mutually exclusive, we’re determined to lead the way towards a sustainable future of travel. Sign up to our newsletter to stay tuned.

chunks.heading: Our Quality Promise
chunks.text: Our products accompany you for life. Our dedicated team of designers and engineers carefully sources the highest-quality materials. Each range goes through rigorous testing before launching, so you travel with dependable companions you can fall back on for years to come.

chunks.heading: Going the extra mile for truly sustainable choices
chunks.text: With each of our travel staples we take travel towards a greener future. We’re disruptors at heart: we not only apply the highest standards of German engineering and rigorous testing methods but work with the most creative developers and manufacturers around the world. Driven by our claim Let’s Go. Further. we keep pushing boundaries every step of the way.

chunks.heading: Masterminding change
chunks.text: Fabric innovation is a true passion of ours. We go beyond carefully considering the quality of our materials, and only rely on those bringing us closer to a world driven by circularity. That’s our way of ensuring that your travel companions look sleek, stand the test of time, and are made responsibly at the same time. Lifetime Warranty on all Pro and Essential Luggage GQ : Best Suitcase of Year 2026

chunks.heading: Up to 97% recycled aerospace-grade polycarbonate
chunks.text: For both durability and sustainability, the hard shells of our M5, H5, H6 and H7 perfectly blend virgin and recycled polycarbonate, which we solely source in a strict closed-loop system and thereby eliminate waste. With the RE Series, we upped the hard shell’s recycled share to an astonishing 97% – and a new benchmark of sustainable luggage – without compromising its performance.

chunks.heading: Recycled lightweight nylon
chunks.text: Our lightweight and incredibly long-lasting recycled nylon of select lines has a soft-touch and is water-resistant. It’s made from post-consumer waste.

chunks.heading: Waterproof tarpaulin
chunks.text: Tarpaulin is a heavy-duty flexible composite textile made from synthetic yarns that are thermo-laminated. We’re currently testing stage a new sustainable alternative: 100% recycled, its production will save up to 60% of wastewater and 60% of greenhouse gas emissions. For its durability, and our Gion range’s eminent quality in particular, we will know no compromises.

chunks.heading: Recycled cotton canvas
chunks.text: The recycled cotton threads are coated synthetically, then tightly woven into a heavy-duty, water-resistant canvas. The finish offers an extra layer of protection and develops a unique patina over time as a testament to your travels.

chunks.heading: Vegan Hi-Core
chunks.text: Often used in high-end sportswear, our signature fabric is waterproof, UV-resistant, incredibly durable, and 100% animal-friendly. It is more flexible and softer to the touch than tarpaulin, but will still withstand even the harshest of conditions. The water and any other additives used in the manufacturing process are continuously recycled in a closed loop.

chunks.heading: Recycled water resistant lining
chunks.text: A high-density, water-resistant, and 100% recycled lining that minimises the risk of leaks and spills soaking through. We don’t advise you to wash this fabric in a washing machine as this would remove its waterproof coating.

chunks.heading: Circle One
chunks.text: Circle One moves luggage towards 100% renewable materials. Made in Europe, it will feature a fully plant-based hard shell innovation, BioX, with flax as its main ingredient – an incredibly resilient natural fibre, that will make the Circle One lighter than aluminium, longer-lasting than polycarbonate, and greener than any of its competitors. The innovation will be complete with seed and nutshell-infused handles and a magnesium telescope.

meta.label: more_about_our_efforts_and_impact
meta.title: Our Efforts and Impact | Horizn Studios

chunks.heading: Going Further, Together
chunks.text: For you to consume consciously, we need to make responsible choices every step of the way. As we’re entering a new era of sustainable travel, we’re not only prioritising our responsibility to protect our planet, but also continue our commitment to fighting social injustices. Lifetime Warranty on all Pro and Essential Luggage GQ : Best Suitcase of Year 2026

chunks.heading: Shaping Sustainable Travel
chunks.text: As firm believers in a world without boundaries, we know that together we can shape the future of travel. From the longevity of our products to prioritising cruelty-free materials and using recycled packaging, we make sure that your travel companions won’t just stand the test of time, but are made responsibly.

chunks.heading: Together For Female Empowerment
chunks.text: To us, an equal world can only exist with human rights for all. That’s why, in 2023 and in collaboration with Andreas Murkudis, we donated our sales of the company’s annual Murkudis Market to Hawar Help, a Berlin-based initiate supporting the Iranian women’s movement and other social justice programmes.

chunks.heading: Helping to Go Further
chunks.text: Overcoming boundaries and working to create equal opportunities for those who often find themselves in hopeless circumstances will always be of utmost importance to us. In 2020, we launched our social programme, Horizn Together, which in collaboration with the online learning platform, Kiron provides displaced and disadvantaged youth with access to free education. Together, we open new horizons – all over the world.

chunks.heading: Fostering New Talent in The Arts
chunks.text: With a great passion for the arts, we pride ourselves in our support of emerging talent. Our entire brand is deeply rooted in creative culture, from music to visual art. Driven by our core values of curiosity, creativity, and collaboration, our Horizn Art Programme supports artists from all over the world on their journey to creative excellence.

chunks.heading: Like-minded brands coming together
chunks.text: Horizn Studios is built in the spirit of curiosity, creativity and collaboration. We believe deeply in the power of exchanging ideas and co-creation. As the leading travel brand for the next generation, we love to explore partnerships within the digital, travel and design space, but also love coming together with friends from within the creative community like DJs, photographers and artists. As the common ground, there needs to be a shared mindset and high standards in quality of everything we

chunks.heading: Like-minded brands coming together
chunks.text: do together. Take a look at some partners Horizn Studios has collaborated with already to further pioneer the future of travel with great designs, products, services and common values. Feel free to send an email to communications@horizn-studios.com if you believe we could build an equally successful partnership with your brand. We look forward to hearing from you. Lifetime Warranty on all Pro and Essential Luggage GQ : Best Suitcase of Year 2026

chunks.heading: Together For Men's Mental Health
chunks.text: A special luggage edition in collaboration with Harry’s Together with Harry’s, the men’s grooming brand, and artist Eike König, we’re excited to launch a special luggage edition. Raising awareness for men’s mental health through the artist’s interpretation, it supports Harry’s social cause dedicated to opening up a dialogue around the subject.

chunks.heading: Habitas x Horizn Studios
chunks.text: Habitas is a place where like-minded people come together to share stories, share a meal, make music and discover new worlds. Together, Habitas and Horizn are finding ways to make a positive and lasting impact.

chunks.heading: Soho House x Horizn Studios
chunks.text: Luggage for the Global Creative Community From New York and Mumbai to White City and West Hollywood, Soho House serves as the global creative community’s homes-away-from-home all over the globe. Now, Horizn Studios will help get you there. Closely connected from day one, Horizn Studios and Soho House now celebrate their shared values with a special-edition luggage set to help get you from House to House.

chunks.heading: Seth Troxler x Horizn Studios
chunks.text: As the leading travel brand for the global creative community, Horizn Studios joined forces with international DJ and producer Seth Troxler to create the first edition of the Professional Line. This DJ case encapsulates everything we stand for; seamlessly bringing together our brand ethos of integrating travel technology with expert craftsmanship – thanks to the invaluable expertise from world-renowned DJ Seth Troxler. Let’s Go. Pro.

chunks.heading: Emeka Ogboh x Horizn Studios
chunks.text: We teamed up with global citizen and celebrated artist Emeka Ogboh, and our friends at Beats by Dre, for a limited edition series of luggage and travel essentials inspired by the vibrant African megacity Lagos and its iconic people mover: the black-striped, yellow danfo bus. Let’s Go. Lagos.

chunks.heading: SoFo Rolltop Backpack X
chunks.text: Water-sealed cotton canvas See more images (10) See more images (9) Withstanding rough terrains and everyday wear, this lightweight companion is gentle on the planet and your every move, with its adjustable closure system ensuring a secure seal while providing quick access to your essentials when you need them. It’s the evolution of our signature SoFo Rolltop, featuring an easy-access front pocket and 16” laptop compartment. Water and heat-resistant coated cotton canvas (100% recycled)

chunks.heading: SoFo Rolltop Backpack X
chunks.text: Expandable to up to 28 litres with adjustable metal hook closure Spacious main compartment with small zip pocket Separate rear section for a 16” laptop and with zip pocket Waterproof bottom and lining Premium strap to secure to Horizn luggage

chunks.heading: Material
chunks.text: Our premium water-sealed cotton canvas is lightweight, incredibly durable, and, thanks to its tight, high-density weave and synthetic wax finish, impervious to water and heat. In addition, this product is 100% recycled. For cleaning tips, check out our Care Guide .
